_description: One inference response from GRU4Rec serving. item_idx is the 1-based vocab index; track_id is the original 30Music track ID (idx2item lookup). rank is 1-based. score is the model's raw dot-product logit (pre-softmax; higher = more likely next track). request_id echoes back x-request-id header or a server-generated uuid. oov_count reports how many items in the incoming prefix_item_idxs were dropped as out-of-vocab before inference.
